description: inspect the host for Holoscan install readiness: detect Conda and check the NGC container image (read-only)
rules: read-only — inspects host state only; never pulls, installs, or mutates anything
check_conda searches PATH, common install dirs, and shell rc files; reports which envs import holoscan
check_ngc_image greps `docker images` for the clara-holoscan/holoscan image matching CUDA_TAG_SUFFIX (no pulls)
both tools write their reports under record_store
usage: Set CUDA_TAG_SUFFIX (one of cuda13 | cuda12-dgpu | cuda12-igpu, from the nvidia-smi CUDA Version). Outputs: conda.txt and ngc_image.txt.
limitation: Inspection only — does not install Holoscan or delegate to an install method. check_ngc_image needs docker on PATH; without it the report notes the image is not found. Conda packages are CUDA 13 only; native installs cannot exceed the driver's reported CUDA Version (only containers use Forward Compatibility).
